assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel, and structures the checklists to accommodate both environments with specific callouts for each.

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions Autopilot limitations including mandatory resource requests, no SSH access implied by automated node management, and Google managing node operations automatically.

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: The response includes specific kubectl commands for checking deprecated API usage: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' and mentions checking GKE deprecation insights dashboard.

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: The response prominently features mandatory resource requests as '#1 cause of post-upgrade pod failures in Autopilot' and includes a specific kubectl command to check for containers without CPU/memory requests.

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: The pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs configuration, checking for bare pods (all managed by controllers), and terminationGracePeriodSeconds limits for graceful shutdown.

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: The post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version and kubectl commands to check node versions: 'gcloud container clusters describe PROD_CLUSTER --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"' and 'kubectl get nodes -o wide'.

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: The post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks including deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, HPA/VPA functionality, and application validation sections.

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends using dev clusters on Rapid channel as natural staging to validate workload compatibility before prod upgrade and includes dev validation as a complete section in the pre-upgrade checklist.

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the GKE release schedule or provide information about advance notice timing beyond the immediate notification mentioned in the user prompt.
The response includes detailed observability validation in both pre-upgrade (baseline metrics) and post-upgrade checklists (metrics pipeline, logs, error rates, latency, resource utilization).

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response only discusses control plane maintenance exclusions and explicitly mentions that Google manages node operations automatically in Autopilot, without recommending node-level maintenance exclusions.
